meta.source: Public X posts & YouTube — sourced from Google Sheet (accounts with 3+ interactions, May 7–14 2026)

nodes.label: Jay Dyer
nodes.desc: Central provocateur and public blocker. Initiated attacks on GodLogic and Wood, engaged in mass blocking of critics. Highest centrality in the conflict network.

nodes.label: ByJimbob
nodes.desc: Active content creator. Ran multiple reaction Spaces on May 13, including 'Andrew Wilson Puts Wood In The Chipper' — high-engagement Orthobros output.

nodes.label:
Orthodox
Elijah
nodes.desc: Strong Dyer defender. Criticized Wood's debate performance on May 13, actively countering the Wood side.

nodes.label: Epkon406
nodes.desc: Dyer supporter active across both debate and post-debate phases. Consistent thread defense of the Orthobros position.

nodes.label: C2Antiquity
nodes.desc: Strong public defender of Dyer. Posted a high-engagement support thread on May 14 amplifying the Orthobros position.

nodes.label:
Andrew
Wilson
nodes.desc: Orthodox debater. Faced David Wood in the live May 13 YouTube debate 'Why Are OrthoBros Helping Jihadis?' — formal representative of the Orthobros side.

nodes.label: David Wood
nodes.desc: Central figure with high engagement. Hosted major May 13 debate, announced '10 Problems with Eastern Orthodoxy' series May 14, and publicly supported GodLogic after the schism.

nodes.label: GodLogic GL
nodes.desc: Major catalyst. Previously collaborated with Dyer on anti-Islam streams, then attacked by Dyer over grift accusations. Flipped to Wood's side — the event that triggered the broader schism. Featured in Wood's May 14 post.

nodes.label:
Sam
Shamoun
nodes.desc: Prominent Evangelical apologist and long-term David Wood collaborator. Frequently mentioned in the debate space.

nodes.label:
Apostate
Prophet
nodes.desc: Ex-Muslim Christian apologist. Long-term collaborator with David Wood on anti-Islam content.

nodes.label: Cinemanarchism
nodes.desc: Consistent neutral commenter. Pushed back on both Dyer and Wood post-debate, questioning both sides' conduct.

nodes.label:
ICXC
Zachariah
nodes.desc: Active neutral engager. Consistent neutral activity in Dyer's debate-phase threads without aligning with either faction.

nodes.label:
GaryColeman
5640
nodes.desc: Blocking discussion participant. Commented on Dyer's pattern of mass-blocking critics post-debate.

nodes.label: VikingPrime
nodes.desc: Active replier in Wood's debate-phase threads. Engaged without strongly committing to either side.

nodes.label: ObiWanSunobi
nodes.desc: Observed and commented on Dyer's blocking behavior post-debate.

nodes.label: d_bahler
nodes.desc: Early critic of Dyer's obsession with conflict, questioning the pattern before the debate phase began.

nodes.label: Mormonger
nodes.desc: Active in debate threads around David Wood during the May 13 debate phase.

nodes.desc: Posted in David Wood's debate threads on May 13.

nodes.desc: Engaged in discussion around Jay Dyer during the May 13 debate phase.

nodes.desc: Active commenter in Dyer's threads during the May 13 debate phase.

nodes.desc: Provided historical context commentary in Jay Dyer's debate-phase threads.
